title: Bridge Essay: Insight and the selection of ideas.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**Insight and the selection of ideas.**. Neurosci Biobehav Rev.. PMID: 37598874. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105363. Perhaps it is no accident that insight moments accompany some of humanity'smost important discoveries in science, medicine, and art. Here we propose that feelings of insight play acentral role in (heuristically) selecting an idea from the stream of consciousness by capturing attention and eliciting asense of intuitive confidence permitting fast action under uncertainty.
